name: Pineapple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt), stirring after each addition.
4. Stir in the crushed pineapple with juice until combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned on the edges.
7. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
Applesauce variation:
1. Replace the crushed pineapple with 1 1/2 cups applesauce.
2. Use 3/4 cup brown sugar and 3/4 cup white sugar instead of just white sugar.
3. Substitute 1 1/2 cups whole wheat flour for some of the white flour (e.g., use equal parts whole wheat flour and white flour).
4. Add 1 teaspoon cinnamon and 1/4 teaspoon mace to the mixture.
5. Mix all ingredients thoroughly and bake as above.
